_meta.discovery_method: JS bundle analysis of main.55c285a7.js + live API probing
notes: MGU EDP is a React SPA (create-react-app, no server-side rendering)
Real API backend is at https://ugpapi.mgu.ac.in/ugp/api/ (separate domain from frontend)
Exam list and captcha endpoints require NO authentication
PublicResultView also requires NO authentication (truly public endpoint)
CRITICAL: captcha response includes captcha_text (the answer) — auto-solvable!
No rate limiting detected on 3 rapid captcha requests
No Cloudflare challenge or bot protection on public API endpoints
Response shape confirmed by decompiling minified React component (Cg = ViewResult page)

pageType: SPA - React (create-react-app, React Router hash routing)

activeexam.examtitle: Second Semester MGU-BBA(Honours)/MGU-BCA (Honours) Regular Examination April 2026

examListEndpoint.note: Returns all currently active exams. No auth required. 15 exams confirmed live.

captchaEndpoint.note: CRITICAL: captcha_text contains the ANSWER. Worker can auto-solve without human input. captcha_id is integer. Image is a clean PNG.
captchaEndpoint.cachingNote: Must use Cache-Control: no-store on worker response — each call returns fresh captcha with new ID

workerStrategy.note: Since captcha_text is returned with the image, the worker can auto-solve captcha transparently.
workerStrategy.examList: GET /api/mgu/exam-list — fetches getActiveExam, maps to { value: examid, label: examtitle, semesterid }
workerStrategy.captcha: GET /api/mgu/captcha — fetches GenerateCaptcha, stores captcha_text internally, returns only image and captcha_id to frontend. Frontend sends captcha_id back with submission; worker uses stored captcha_text for auto-submission OR frontend displays image for manual entry.
workerStrategy.result: POST /api/mgu/fetch-result — receives { prn, examId, captchaAnswer?, captchaId } from frontend, calls PublicResultView with correct params, parses and structures result
